name: azure-devops-extension-cycle-time-histogram
description: Azure DevOps dashboard widget: Cycle Time Histogram with configurable percentiles
author: Altamir Junior Dias

scripts.package: npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path ./publish --rev-version
scripts.package:dev: npm run build:dev && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension-dev.json --output-path ./publish
scripts.publish:dev: npm run package:dev && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension-dev.json
